title: Out of office replies
excerpt: Need a way other than the small “-” on a person’s avatar to know when someone is out of the office.  If someone sends a message or comment, they need to know that a person is out of the office rather than just thinking s…

posts.author: Rhonee (Rhonee Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: Need a way other than the small “-” on a person’s avatar to know when someone is out of the office. If someone sends a message or comment, they need to know that a person is out of the office rather than just thinking someone did not reply to them.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rhone,
You could also look into setting their capacity to 0 during their leave period
Cheers,
Harsh

posts.author: byteboutiquein (Raj)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! I built an Out of Office Assistant for monday that handles OOO coverage automatically.

What it does

  • Each user sets their OOO dates + backup once (Global setting)

  • On boards you choose: when the owner is OOO, the app posts a clear update

  • Optional auto-reassign to the backup (Hard mode)

  • If the backup isn’t a board subscriber (private board), it won’t reassign—it will only notify in updates

  • Optional @mention auto-reply with rate-limiting

Marketplace link: Out Of Office Assistant - monday.com Marketplace

posts.author: byteboutiquein (Raj)
posts.cookedHtml:
We built Out of Office Assistant to solve it inside boards:
• Users set OOO dates + choose a backup (global)
• Admin picks board behavior: Warn or Auto-reassign to backup
• @mention auto-reply with rate limits to avoid spam

monday.com

Automatically route work when users are out of office.
